zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Morley於1416年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可拉可亞斯時，她的父親William Morley26歲，母親Mrs William Morley26歲。她和John Yelverton至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1504年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Morley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Morley (for example in Derbyshire, County Durham, Norfolk, and Yorkshire), or Moreleigh in Devon, all of which are named from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murghaile ‘descendant of Murghal’, a personal name based on muir ‘sea’ + gal ‘valour’.
Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murthuile ‘descendant of Murthuile’, a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’ + tuile ‘tide’.

variants.name: Marler
meanings: occupational name from Middle English marler, either ‘spreader of marl (as fertilizer)’ or ‘hewer or quarrier of marl’.
topographic name from Middle English marlere ‘marl-pit’ (Old French marliere).
in Norfolk, perhaps also a variant of   Morley  .

variants.name: Murley
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): variant of   Morley  .

English (Cornwall and Somerset): habitational name from Murley in Uplowman (Devon). The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. There may well have been some confusion with Morley .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Morley was born in 1416, in Rackheath, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Morley, was 26 and her mother, Mrs William Morley, was 26. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with John Yelverton. She died in 1504, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec John Yelverton. Elle est décédée en 1504, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Morleyが1416年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクラックヒースで生まれた時，父William Morleyは26歳，母Mrs William Morleyは26歳であった。彼女はJohn Yelvertonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1504年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Morley(이)가 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 라크히스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Morley(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs William Morley(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 John Yelverton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.
